Bug Report

Describe the bug
The "Submit" button on the login page is unresponsive when clicked, preventing the user from logging in.

To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:

Go to the login page at https://example.com/login

Enter a valid username and password.

Click on the "Submit" button.

See error: The button doesn't respond, and the page doesn't load.

Expected behavior
The "Submit" button should trigger a login request and direct the user to the dashboard page.

Screenshots


(If applicable, provide any screenshot or link to an image showing the issue)

Desktop (please complete the following information):

OS: Windows 10

Browser: Chrome

Version: 91.0.4472.124

Smartphone (please complete the following information):

Device: iPhone 12

OS: iOS 15.0

Browser: Safari

Version: 15.1

Additional context
The issue began occurring after the recent update to the login page on 02/27/2026. Users have reported the same problem on different devices.
